The Java Developer will design, develop, and maintain the back-end of large web-based applications using Java, Spring Boot, Kafka,

Key Responsibilities:
The job holder will design, develop, and maintain the back-end of large web-based applications using Java. They will participate in technical analysis, documentation, implementation, and integration, as well as test and manage early life support for core software tools and assets. The role requires attending daily Scrum events, including planning, retrospectives, and refinements. Additionally, the developer will attend meetings with Product Owners and clients to discuss technical impediments.

Required Skills:
- Experience with Java and Java Spring boot
- Experience in Kafka
- Experience with Mongo DB and Microservices
- Design, development, and maintenance of back-end large web-based applications
- Technical analysis, documentation, implementation, and integration
- Testing and managing early life support of core software tools and assets
- Participation in Scrum events (daily planning, retrospective, refinement)
- Ability to discuss technical impediments with Product Owners and/or Clients
- Fluent English

Tools and Technologies:
Java, Spring boot, Kafka, Mongo DB, Microservices

Experience Level:
Not explicitly stated.

job_description: TurnKey Labs is the most trusted offshore software development firm for innovative software startups and the venture capitalists that back them is looking for a dynamic marketing wizard to expand our marketing efforts and further fuel our customer acquisition. TurnKey has grown organically due to a great reputation and strong referral stream among customers. But now we are looking to accelerate our growth by hiring a creative and thoughtful marketing leader who can formalize our marketing processes and drive activities that generate additional customer leads. Reporting to TurnKey s CEO you will be leading all marketing activities of the company as we build a compelling brand for both of our core targets prospective customers and investors in the U.S. market and amazing software development talent locally in Ukraine. Why you should care Work with a fast growing Silicon Valley-based company. Build the foundation for TurnKey s marketing efforts and be a key decision-maker. Collaborate directly with TurnKey s founders two serial Silicon Valley entrepreneurs. Enjoy the freedom to be imaginative experiment widely and stop following the status quo. Propel your career in a work hard play hard culture where everyone s opinion counts. Key Responsibilities Create the marketing strategy Conduct target market analysis industry trends research and maintain ongoing competitive audit. In collaboration with senior management define marketing strategy target market segments key offerings value proposition and more. Refine corporate brand identity and positioning. Revise and improve current messaging. Implement and optimize the strategy Develop actionable plan for brand promotion and lead generation channels campaigns budgets and ROI targets . Coordinate with senior management on objectives leads and ROI on marketing activities. Collaborate with the recruitment team regarding marketing support for recruitment objectives. Develop and maintain marketing collateral website sales presentations case studies and more. Track marketing KPIs and optimizing activities to improve outcomes executive reporting. Create and execute an integrated digital strategy -. Maintain company presence on social media platforms LinkedIn Facebook Instagram DOU and create exciting and insightful content that breaks through the noise. -. Develop and execute digital ad strategies PPC SEO to attract website traffic and convert traffic to leads. -. Create content and content-driven lead generation campaigns. Experience 5+ years in marketing including 3+ years working directly at a software development outsourcing or offshoring firm. Strong understanding of key marketing concepts such as market segmentation value proposition differentiation buyer journey branding messaging etc. Experience in building marketing strategy and action plans for a software development outsourcer or offshore firm. Strong experience in digital marketing and content-driven lead generation. Proven experience in lead generation with measurable KPIs and ROI. Advanced level in written English. Advanced spoken English. Personality Type That Will Do Well In This Job You prize imagination and creativity. You like to think differently about problems and how to solve them. You are results-oriented and focused on winning. You love to be part of a close collaborative team. You enjoy having autonomy and independence. You are comfortable with uncertainty and rapidly changing priorities. Additional Benefits of the Job Strong professional and personal growth that will help accelerate your career progression. Tap into broader Silicon Valley ecosystem. Work closely with the founding team and learn from top American executives. Access to English courses or other training as needed/desired . Unlimited PTO for any reason including sick days no specified limits flexible work schedule Personal laptop MacBook Trainings certifications conferences Private health dental insurance Business trips to headquarters in Menlo Park Accounting and legal support required to file taxes. Remote/coworking work.

job_description: Job Description The Creative Designer is a key position in Turnitin s Global Creative Services team. This person reports directly to the Creative Director but will also work with marketing teams and colleagues within the business. The position is responsible for taking briefs and developing on brand creative concepts that can be executed as integrated marketing campaigns across all media. This person partners closely with Designers Copywriters internally and externally employed to develop the most effective ways to visually position products services and solutions. Work with the Creative Director and wider Global Marketing team to deliver new ideas and projects for both new and existing campaigns. Responsible for developing creative concepts and design that work across all media including digital banners web social media print and video. Ensure that all design work follows corporate guidelines. Design of icons infographics ebooks and photo retouching. Create edit export assets for web banners product images blog content social posts. Digital animation for websites digital adverts social and videos. Participate in brainstorming content ideas as part of a wider creative team. Confidently present ideas to the customer and explain the methodology behind. Review project feasibility with an eye on balancing innovation with constraints on time and resources. Manage projects and ensure we hit deadlines and SLA targets. Has precise attention to detail with pixel-perfect accuracy. Qualifications Essential. Strong portfolio showing quality and diversity in the design techniques and styles you use. Fluent written and spoken English. 3+ years successful professional design experience preferably at a digital agency or in-house team. In-depth knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite. In particular Illustrator InDesign Photoshop and experience of After Effects and Animate. Good knowledge of Google slides and docs. Strong appreciation of typography colour and the effective use of space. Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate in teams or independently. Excellent time management and project management. Desirable. Basic knowledge of CSS and HTML and an interest in UX and prototyping is desirable. Knowledge of CMS and able to publish updates to content. Experience of Figma. Experience of international multi-language projects. Experience in the creation of motion graphics videos is desirable but not essential to the role. Degree in digital design graphic design graphic communications or equivalent experience. Additional Information . A smart fun and casual environment where you can learn from and teach others. A great mission. you will be involved in building a distinct and recognizable global brand identity in the education market. We offer . Professional growth opportunity. Generous holiday allowance. Free English classes. Young and friendly team. Close-knit family atmosphere. Flexible schedule. Comfortable and modern office.

job_description: As a remote partner in our network you will participate in the creation of enterprise-class applications on the latest technology platforms using proven design patterns. job_description: We the aqua cloud team are professionals and enthusiasts creating cool and useful products with a focus on QA for IT teams to make IT product development easier and more reliable. Hundred of companies in the market have been using our products for over 6 years. from small start-ups to IT giants banks and municipal organizations. To continue product development and successful expansion into new markets we are looking for a QA Automation specialist to help develop our QA processes and achieve 100 test automation. Join our team Your responsibilities will include . Perform system functional data integration user acceptance performance API and regression testing of our complex web solutions aqua DrivT . Create and update test documentation . Develop and continuously improve automated tests . Work in a dynamic agile-based environment . Implement testing procedures and monitor the quality assurance process . Collaborate with other team members to improve the efficiency of testing processes. We expect from you . 3+ years of experience in manual testing of web applications . At least 1 year of experience in test automation building frameworks and developing testing tools . English proficiency of at least B1 level. the ability to communicate with the international team orally and in writing . Hands-on experience with testing artifacts test plan test design test case test script . Passion for quality and in-depth knowledge of quality assurance methodologies and tools . Knowledge of basic principles of the modern software development process version control systems issue tracking continuous integration etc . Experience in WEB and API testing . Test automation languages C# Typescript Python are preferable. Experience with .NET PowerShell and Selenium . Experience with CI / CD BDD Gherkin will be a plus. We offer . Work in a stable and constantly growing German IT company . 100 remote . Salary in Euros . Challenging tasks and an opportunity to build your test framework based on the technologies you choose . No bureaucracy a healthy friendly positive atmosphere . Public holidays in accordance with your national work calendar . Paid vacation. 4 weeks per year compensation sick leave. up to 5 days per year.

Role Overview:
The aqua cloud team is seeking a QA Automation specialist to help develop QA processes and achieve 100 test automation for their complex web solutions

Key Responsibilities:
You will perform system, functional, data integration, user acceptance, performance, API, and regression testing for complex web solutions like aqua DrivT. Your role involves developing and continuously improving automated tests to help achieve 100% test automation while creating and updating necessary test documentation. Additionally, you will implement testing procedures, monitor the quality assurance process, and collaborate with team members in a dynamic agile environment to improve testing efficiency.

Required Skills:
* 3+ years of experience in manual testing of web applications
* At least 1 year of experience in test

Tools and Technologies:
aqua cloud, aqua DrivT, C#, Typescript, Python, .NET, PowerShell, Selenium, CI / CD

Experience Level:
3+ years of experience in manual testing of web applications
At least 1 year of experience in test automation building frameworks and developing testing tools

Responds to and acts as the central point of communication in all events and of circumstances impacting account performance. Keenly observes the queue and proactively responds with action plans for the account s activities by continually communicating with Team Captains and Operations Management. Keeps abreast of new policies and procedures addressing day-to-day issues of specific accounts. Provides information on key issues and challenges in attaining service levels and devises necessary responses to resolve such matters. Occasionally conducts training for Team Captains in order to equip them with the necessary skills for real-time queue management. Conducts training for new hires or as required for Operations. Other related tasks assigned by managers of the Clients and/or Helpware Who are we looking for At least one 1 year of Workforce Management experience within the call center / customer service industry. Formal training in Workforce Management i.e. real-time data analysis queue management preferred. Previous call center operations experience preferred. Time and project management skills. Proficiency with MS Office applications i.e. MS Word Excel as well as call center-specific software and applications i.e. Baleen BluePumpkin CentreVu NICE iEX Verint etc .

job_description: Using their SaaS cloud platform broadcasters and content owners can develop and launch apps OTT services or integrate selected modules and functionalities such as engagement and interactivity into third-party apps. Apps powered by this platform are used by millions of viewers worldwide every day. They proudly count among its customers ProSiebenSat.1 Television Academy Viacom Baby First and many more. The Frameworks team is in charge of the core platform of our product. They develop APIs and SDKS in JavaScript iOS and Android which allows implementation teams and external developers to build rich mobile and TV applications. The team is responsible for the core UI framework which provides the building blocks for mobile and OTT apps. Responsibilities You will develop rich mobile and TV applications using the unique React Native framework. You will architect design and develop core APIs to be used by internal and external teams. Participate and lead research and design of various framework and end-user components. You will use your familiarity with recent technologies and practices to develop client-side infrastructural systems and integrate them into existing ones. You will be responsible for the end-to-end development of your work from research and design to automated testing and quality control Requirements 3+ years of experience in developing mobile applications iOS Android web-based 2+ years of experience in React Native Experience working with Typescript Deep understanding of JavaScript and strong capabilities of performance optimizations and debugging. Experience in Open source environment JSON for client-server communication high version control skills with emphasis on git Meaningful experience working on large complex systems. Ability to take extreme ownership over your work. Every day is a challenge to ensure you are performing to the expectations you and your team have agreed upon in regards to estimates and to the general process. An understanding of React Native best practices and a commitment to following them. Ability to work through new and difficult React Native issues and contribute to libraries as needed. Ability to create and maintain continuous integration and delivery of React Native applications. Self-management in an agile environment Good communication in English ideally Upper-Intermediate or higher Nice to have Experience developing TV apps Apple TV Android TV Samsung Tizen . Experience working with Swift Kotlin digital video compression packaging distribution and automated testing. We offer Competitive salary depending on your experience Professional development opportunities Study and practice of English courses and communication with colleagues and clients from different countries Yoga classes Compensation package paid vacation sick leaves Flexible working hours from 9-11 to 18-20 Comfortable office or possibility to work remotely

Conduct post-release/ post-implementation testing. Monitor applications and software systems. Present findings to software development and business user teams. Effectively collaborate with team members to achieve the best results. You need to have hands-on experience and good understanding of 2+ years industry experience in QA or Software Engineering. Testing processes methodologies and standards. Testing Web and Mobile Applications. Cross-browser cross-device testing. Software release procedures and defect tracking test planning and execution. Relational and no-SQL databases. MySQL PostgreSQL MongoDB. Postman and Swagger. Upper-Intermediate level of English or higher. job_description: The Project The new POD of 5 Java engineers we are building at the moment will join an already existing team of 15 people that are currently working from Israel. The project is already ongoing and the new team will join them to help with new ideas and adding new features to work on developing it into a bigger and central area. Basically few major projects they want to do to make it happen. The team will be exposed to high complexity and great traffic of users. This project is not for internal usage of the Client but the main goal is to create these new platforms focusing on driving things for the users of this e-commerce platform. It is project e-commerce and SEO related. The Team This is an independent team so the Client is looking for developers with a solid background working with end-to-end development with a great big picture of the whole process once they re going to be part not only of the day to day development path but will also be responsible to test the quality for the project by themselves. The Client really values the knowledge of Java algorithms and a person that knows how to deal with different logic approaches to solving issues and bugs. The ideal candidate will have strong hands-on core Java and Java Web programming skills excellent problem solving and design skills and the ability to work collaboratively within different teams. The candidate should also demonstrate a history of on-time delivery excellent communication and a positive get-it-done attitude. Experience working in Agile-driven development projects is a plus. The Tech Stack Java versions from 8 beyond Microservices Algorithms Spring frameworks specially Springboot JUnit JBehave Mockito Test containers etc Requirements. 6+ years of Java experience while 1+ years of tech/team leadership experience. Experience with the latest version of Java. Experience with Spring framework. Experience with OO design and design patterns. Experience in building Restful services. Good understanding of using various database systems NoSQL and relational at scale. Drive architecture discussions produce well-documented design docs and participate in design and code reviews. Partner effectively and influence peers juniors and seniors both within the organization. Flexibility and passion to learn new domains. Experience in working with agile development methodologies and scrum master role Benefits. Flexible working hours. You can work remotely from the office or mix both. Separate room for every team and spacious technically equipped workplace. Close to park location. Regular Performance Appraisal. Free English courses. Corporate doctor. Access to online courses. Corporate events and so on

job_description: You are open to new ideas willing to work on challenging tasks ready to make them more modern and flexible and competitive enough in the market. Then our team is waiting for you. Customer Our customer holds leading positions in the Swedish and Danish public sectors as a high-quality IT product provider. Our cooperation with them has been successfully evolving for more than 12 years. During this time we established trustful and mutually respectful relations. Project It is a well-structured modern scalable and flexible business platform based on a Service Oriented Architecture SOA . The application has a wide range of standard functions and components and can be configured to support any organizations domain processes and business rules. One of the platform s primary purposes is to use in grants management and most of the grants in Denmark are managed through this platform. Our task is to make the solution modern and flexible and be more competitive and exceed expectations. Responsibilities Work closely with the team to ensure the achievement of project goals. Play supervisory advisory and coaching roles for the team. Contribute to the technical and software design decisions within and across all the teams. Since the product is complicated enough one of the first tasks and challenges will be to become acquainted with the current architecture on the level sufficient to make decisions. Ensure a successful migration to a microservices architecture and eliminate Biz Talk. Knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript programming languages and proven experience in SPA development utilizing Angular or any other modern framework/library like React or Vue . Experience in ASP.NET Boilerplate and/or ASP.NET Zero frameworks WCF and/or ASMX technologies message-broker software RabbitMQ Kafka or similar BizTalk Server CI/CD configuration What we offer
